## Exit criteria

- [ ] sandbox_hell_frame exits 0 with Violence Circle + Open Arena skin + three Malakor/Niccolò lines triggered

## Prompt

New sandbox. Loads Violence Circle at Open Arena skin, enables full
horror post + BloodDecalSystem + diegetic HUD, runs 30 seconds of
simulated gameplay driving SinComponent past thresholds to fire
three voice lines, prints HELL FRAME OK, exits 0.
